task: how do I test the new attach command that was added in this branch
I want to verify it works via the cli locally though, not using the tests

Perfect, that works. Let's modify the behavior now to ask "amend to last commit in this branch? [Y] [n]" ([Y] is the default if the user presses Enter). If the user says n, it should print out something like this: Copy to your commit message to attach:

Entire-Checkpoint: f90496235d8a


If the user says Y, amend to the last commit. Also, when asking the user if they want to amend, actually display the commit with the id.
user_feedback_text:
